anti_claim: This standard describes the public voice-to-doctrine self-improvement loop schema only; it does not authorize raw-voice export, private thread export, provider calls, live Task Ledger mutation, source mutation, global doctrine promotion, release, or publication.
receipt_expectations: report observed and expected negative-case ids
separate blocking findings from expected negative-case rejections
include owner surface counts, status counts, and source pattern refs

standard_payload.anti_purpose: A receipt-only pattern note that claims system learning without owner-surface mutation, validation, or re-entry condition.
failure_modes: raw operator voice body exported into public fixture
doctrine node mutated by direct file edit instead of apply lane
local skill or paper-module consumption closes without deposit
pattern receipt accepted as progress without changed owner surface
global doctrine promotion claimed without owner validation
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe organ that turns local pressure into owner-surface mutation, residual capture, or typed no-op under validation.
standard_payload.teleology: Show the macro system's most important property: it learns from local work and updates its own substrate without rule drift.

validation_rules: require real macro pattern refs for recursive self-improvement, doctrine population, and local-to-general propagation
require owner surface ids, mutation authority, and public refs
reject raw voice, private thread, provider payload, and secret-like bodies
require validation and closeout refs for each lesson
require re-entry condition for residual captures
require stewardship and next-best-lane checks for nothing_to_refine
